detail.description:
The Undersea Mystery has arrived!
Mysterious ocean energy has surged, and a new undersea adventure begins.

[Undersea Realm]
Board a whale‑themed aircraft into the map! Enter the Undersea Realm in Bermuda through whirlpool entrances and fight underwater. The High-tier Loot Zone becomes the Hydro Zone, and giant whales fly across the sky to drop Bubble Airdrops.

[Hydro Blaster & Fishing Ponds]
Try the new event weapon, the Hydro Blaster, for a fresh combat feel. Fishing ponds containing loot hav
detail.recentChanges:
[Undersea Realm] Dive into the seabed in Bermuda and fight underwater! Try out the event weapon Hydro Blaster.
[New Character - Ray] Link to a target and knock them down when they're low on HP. A takedown resets the skill.
[CS Random Events] Bigger starting funds, free Gloo Walls, and other random events shake up CS!
[Pyro] Keep your fiery new companion active to level them up and unlock outfits.
New Play Games Service Achievements will be available after updating to Version 1.123.

eventMentions.text: awful game experience then before, rigid game motion and "l" game updates
high graphics up coming update free fir team
